prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically addresses building safety measures and regulations that are applicable in England under the Building Safety Act 2022. Scotland has its own distinct regulatory framework regarding building safety, separate from that of England, meaning this document does not apply to Scotland.
